title: state commit window opened after owner all-files instruction
body: Owner instructed: commit all files, and all commits should include memory/state files. Current dirty set is collaboration-state and comms surfaces only after graph-core landed at ad2abb69. Hushed Shrouding Mist is committing all visible dirty/untracked files with git add -A, then will run jc-session-handoff and commit that handoff separately.
